hero.headline:
Enjoy a Crystal Clear Pool All Year
Without the Hassle
hero.subheadline: You bought a pool to relax — not to spend your weekends testing chemicals and scrubbing tiles. AJ Pools handles every detail so the only thing you do is dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: South Florida Pool Care<br class="hidden md:block"> Done Right
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full equipment overhauls, our CPO-certified team keeps your pool pristine so you can focus on enjoying it.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Skimming, vacuuming, brushing, and full chemical balancing every visit. Your pool stays sparkling and swim-ready week after week.

cards.title: Pump & Equipment Repair
cards.description: Pentair, Hayward, Jandy, Zodiac — we service all major brands. Fast diagnosis and most repairs completed in a single visit.

cards.title: Green-to-Clean Rescue
cards.description: Algae takeover? We restore green pools to crystal clear in 48-72 hours. Same-day emergency response available for urgent situations.

cards.title: Salt Systems & Automation
cards.description: Upgrade to effortless pool management with salt chlorine generators, smart controllers, and variable-speed pump installations.

cards.title: Heater Installation
cards.description: Gas and heat pump heater installs to extend your swim season year-round. Expert sizing and plumbing for optimal efficiency.

cards.title: Leak Detection & Replumbing
cards.description: Precision leak detection, acid washing, pressure testing, and complete replumbing services to solve stubborn plumbing issues for good.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Request Your Free Quote
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we'll provide a straightforward, no-pressure quote within 24 hours. No contracts, no hidden fees — ever.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our CPO-certified technicians show up on schedule and handle cleaning, chemicals, and equipment checks — so you never lift a finger.

steps.title: Just Dive In
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all year. Not satisfied with any visit? We come back and make it right — that's our happiness guarantee.

about.label: Why South Florida Trusts AJ Pools
about.headline: Founded on Passion, Built on Reliability
about.description: Andrew started caring for pools at age 13 and earned his CPO certification at 18. Since founding AJ Pools in 2012, the team has grown into South Florida's go-to pool care provider — serving Boca Raton, Parkland, Coral Springs, Coconut Creek, and beyond. Every technician is CPO-certified, background-checked, and treats your pool like their own.

features.title: All Technicians CPO-Certified
features.description: Every member of our team holds a Certified Pool Operator credential — not just management, everyone who touches your pool.

features.title: No Contracts. Cancel Anytime.
features.description: We earn your trust every single visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees, no guilt trips.

features.title: 100% Happiness Guarantee
features.description: Not satisfied with any service visit? We return and redo it at no extra charge. Your happiness is non-negotiable.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — zero contracts, zero hassle.

guarantee.headline: Our "100% Happiness" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're ever less than thrilled with a service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right — completely free. No questions asked, no hoops to jump through. We're not satisfied until you are.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients in South Florida are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer same-day or next-day response. Just give us a call and we'll fit you in.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you're away. You'll get a service summary after each visit so you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: What brands of equipment do you service?
faqs.answer: We work with all major brands — Pentair, Hayward, Jandy, Zodiac, and more. Whether it's a pump repair, heater install, or salt system upgrade, we've got you covered.

faqs.question: What if I want to cancel?
faqs.answer: Cancel anytime with zero fees or penalties. We don't do contracts because we believe in earning your business every single visit. It's that simple.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Boca Raton, Parkland, Coral Springs, Coconut Creek, Deerfield Beach, Delray Beach, Lighthouse Point, Pompano Beach, and surrounding South Florida communities.

testimonials.name: David M.
testimonials.text: Andrew and his team are phenomenal. We've used AJ Pools for over six years and our pool has never looked better. They're reliable, thorough, and genuinely care about doing a great job.

testimonials.name: Jessica T.
testimonials.text: Came home from vacation to a swamp. Called AJ Pools on Monday morning and by Wednesday it was sparkling clear. The communication was great and the price was fair. Absolute lifesavers.

testimonials.name: Carlos R.
testimonials.text: Switched from a big franchise and the difference is incredible. AJ Pools actually shows up on time, tests everything properly, and Alicia in the office is super responsive whenever I have questions.

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure quote in 24 hours. No contracts, no commitments — just honest pricing from a team that's been doing this for over a decade.
benefits: Free pool inspection with every quote
